hero.title: We make AI work for your business.
hero.description: We design, build, and deploy intelligent chatbots and automation systems that transform how businesses operate. From customer service to internal workflows — we bring AI where it matters.

marquee.items: CHATBOTS / AUTOMATION / AI INTEGRATION / MACHINE LEARNING / NLP / WORKFLOW OPTIMIZATION / WHATSAPP BUSINESS / CUSTOM AI AGENTS

cards.title: AI Chatbots
cards.description: Custom conversational agents for customer service, lead qualification, and sales automation. Deployed on web, WhatsApp, and messaging platforms.

cards.title: Workflow Automation
cards.description: End-to-end automation of repetitive business processes. From invoice handling to CRM updates — we connect your tools and eliminate manual work.

cards.title: AI Integration
cards.description: Embed intelligence into your existing software stack. We integrate LLMs, computer vision, and predictive models into platforms you already use.

cards.title: AI-Powered Web Apps
cards.description: Full-stack development of web applications enhanced with AI features. Pricing tools, recommendation engines, intelligent dashboards, and more.

cards.title: AI Consulting
cards.description: Strategic guidance on where and how to implement AI in your business. We audit your operations, identify opportunities, and build a roadmap for intelligent transformation.

cards.title: AI Agent Swarms
cards.description: Deploy multiple coordinated AI agents that work together on complex tasks. Our multi-agent systems handle research, analysis, and execution autonomously.

expand.tech_content: Python, Node.js, Next.js, React, Flask, FastAPI, LangChain, Claude API, OpenAI API, Whisper, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, AWS, Render, Vercel, n8n, Make.com, Meta Cloud API, WhatsApp Business Platform.
expand.timeline_content: MVP chatbot: 2-3 weeks. Full automation: 4-6 weeks. AI web app: 6-10 weeks. Enterprise: custom. Agile sprints with weekly demos.
expand.security_content: Encrypted data, OAuth 2.0, RBAC, GDPR-aware, Ecuador's LOPDP compliant.

about.label: WHO WE ARE
about.title: A team of humans and AI agents, building the future.
about.prose1: Quip is not your typical agency. We operate as a hybrid intelligence unit — a core team of senior AI engineers and product strategists, augmented by a fleet of specialized AI agents that work alongside us around the clock.
about.prose2: Based in Quito, Ecuador, we serve businesses across Latin America and beyond. Our mission is clear: bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and real-world business applications. We don't just consult — we build, deploy, and maintain.

values.title: Ship Fast, Iterate Faster
values.description: We believe in velocity. Working MVPs in weeks, not months.

values.title: Measurable Results
values.description: Every solution comes with KPIs. If AI doesn't improve your metrics, we pivot.

values.title: Transparent & Bilingual
values.description: Full visibility into our process. We operate natively in English and Spanish.

about.fleet_description: While you sleep, our agents work. We maintain a coordinated network of specialized AI agents — from research agents that stay current on the latest models, to QA agents that test deployments, to monitoring agents that ensure uptime. This is what makes Quip different: you get the expertise of a senior team backed by always-on AI infrastructure.

contact.label: GET IN TOUCH
contact.title: Let's build something intelligent.
contact.description: Ready to add AI to your business? Tell us about your project, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with an initial assessment and proposed approach.

home.title: Quip — AI Agency | Chatbots & Automation for Business
